Hero.title: Nova Paw Festival
Hero.subtitle: International Pet Festival, First Time in Qatar
Hero.description: Judged by WKU World Kennel Union & WCF World Cat Federation international judges. The world comes to Qatar, and your pet takes center stage.

AboutGrid.title: Where Paws Meet Celebration
AboutGrid.story: The {bold_nova} is Qatar's first international pet festival, bringing together families and animal enthusiasts from around the world for an unforgettable two-day celebration at The Pearl Island. Featuring {bold_wku} and {bold_wcf} international judges, this landmark event sets a new global standard.

ZoneSplit.title: Dedicated Experiences for Every Pet & Owner

events.title: Opening Ceremony
events.desc: Official kickoff of Qatar’s first pet festival at The Pearl. Welcome speech and parade.

events.title: International Dog Show - Preliminaries
events.desc: Watch purebred dogs from around the world compete in the first round of judging.

events.title: K9 Speed & Agility Demo
events.desc: High-energy performance featuring professional service dogs navigating complex obstacle courses.

events.title: Cat Dome: Expert Breed Talk
events.desc: Learn about rare cat breeds and specialized care from international feline experts.

events.title: Evening Live Music & Food Trucks
events.desc: Wind down with family-friendly performances and a curated selection of gourmet pet-themed snacks.

events.title: Pet Fashion Show
events.desc: The most stylish pets hit the runway in custom-designed outfits. Prizes for most creative duo!

events.title: International Cat Show - Finals
events.desc: Grand finale of the feline competition. Crowning the 'Best in Show' cat.

events.title: Community Adoption Parade
events.desc: A special showcase of pets looking for their forever homes. Meet rescue groups and experts.

events.title: Dog Show - Championship Finals
events.desc: The main event. Top-ranked dogs compete for the prestigious Nova Paw Trophy.

events.title: Closing Ceremony & Fireworks
events.desc: Farewell celebration with a synchronized drone show and final prize distributions.

Competitions.title: Join or Participate Now in One of the 6 International Competitions
Competitions.desc: Judged by WKU World Kennel Union & WCF World Cat Federation international judges   your chance to compete on the world stage.

items.title: Dog Fashion Show
items.desc: Owners and dogs strut the runway in matching themed outfits   judged on creativity, coordination, and charm.

items.title: Grooming Competition
items.desc: Professional groomers showcase their artistry   precision trimming, styling, and finishing under WKU supervision.

items.title: Best Dog Show
items.desc: The prestigious WKU-recognized event evaluating breed structure, temperament, and presentation across three classes.

items.title: Best Cat Show
items.desc: WCF-licensed grand judging of elegance, breed standards, and feline grace inside the immersive Cat Dome.

items.title: Cat Drawing Battle
items.desc: A live creative battle where artists compete to draw cats in real-time   speed, style, and imagination under the spotlight.

items.title: Painting Competition
items.desc: Live painting session where artists create cat and dog inspired works projected across the Cat Dome walls.

dog.name: Dog Owner
dog.desc: Includes adult entry and registration for one dog.

cat.name: Cat Owner
cat.desc: Includes adult entry and registration for up to two cats.

adult.name: Adult
adult.desc: General admission for adults and pet enthusiasts.

Venue.title: A World-Class Destination for Pets
Venue.desc: Set against the stunning waterfront of The Pearl Island, Qatar, the festival spans a 270-meter venue featuring the Dog Arena, the immersive Cat Dome, main stage, food trucks, adoption zones, and carnival areas   all designed for maximum fun and comfort for pets and families.

CTABanner.title:
Join the Nova Paw
Festival 2026
CTABanner.subtitle: Don’t miss out on this incredible opportunity to celebrate your pets, connect with fellow lovers, and experience the thrill of the festival!

Footer.newsletter_desc: Subscribe for exclusive festival updates, competition results, and early-bird ticket access.
Footer.brand_desc: Qatar's first international pet festival   WKU & WCF judged competitions, family fun, and celebration of our furry companions.
